author: Rachel
body:
Oh my gosh Matt! I’m not even finished listening to Cobwebs, but I’m ridiculous excited.

I can’t thank you enough for posting and sharing. PS, I just caught Joe Pug’s Hymn 101 video last night :) I finally get to catch this dude live. Hooray! This makes my day.

(( t h a n k y o u ))

author: Burgo
body:
Hey Rachel,  
That’s great stuff, I’m jealous of you seeing Joe live :P

And yeah, the new stuff from the Cards is really impressing me; can’t wait for the new release :)

author: Lori
body:
thanks for this.

It’s refreshing to hear some new stuff from Mr. Adams.
